protocol.name: treeland_screensaver
protocol.copyright: SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2025 UnionTech Software Technology Co., Ltd. SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT

interface.name: treeland_screensaver
interface.description:
This object implements a simple idle inhibit protocol.
Call inhibit to prevent treeland from entering idle state. Call uninhibit or disconnect from the global to release the inhibit.

request.name: inhibit
request.description: Inhibit idleness with given application_name and reason_for_inhibit.

request.name: uninhibit
request.description:
Uninhibit idleness previously inhibited by inhibit request.
Callback data 0 for successful call, 1 when inhibit is yet not requested.
